# Great Agro Coffee — Management System

> Internal management system for Great Agro Coffee, a member of YEDA Coffee Company Limited (P.O. Box 431420, Kasese, Uganda). Handles coffee procurement, quality, inventory, finance, HR, payroll, loans, and traceability (EUDR).

The application is primarily an authenticated business system. Most routes require staff login. The public surfaces below are safe for AI crawlers.

## Pages

- [Home / Sign in](/): Landing and sign-in entry point for staff.
- [Auth](/auth): Authentication page for employees.

## Optional

- [Employee QR profile](/employee/:id): Public read-only profile rendered when scanning an employee QR badge.
